messages.subject: Vending Machine Operator - Wholesale Price Quote Request
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

I'm Charles Paxton, operating a vending machine in San Francisco. I'm looking to stock my machine with beverages and snacks at competitive wholesale prices.

Could you send me your current product list and pricing for:
- Coca-Cola and other soft drinks (12oz cans)
- Water and juices
- Popular snacks (chips, candy, nuts)
- Any bulk discounts available

I'm ready to place my first order soon.

Thanks,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Wholesale Quote Request - Beverages and Snacks
messages.body:
Hi Jonathan,

I'm a new vending machine operator in San Francisco looking to establish a reliable wholesale supply partnership.

Please send your product catalog and pricing for:
- Soft drinks (Coca-Cola, Pepsi, etc.) in 12oz cans
- Water and sports drinks
- Snacks (chips, candy, nuts, granola bars)
- Any volume discounts or special offers

Looking forward to working with you.

Best,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Stock
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I'm Charles Paxton, a new vending machine operator in San Francisco. I'm building my initial inventory and need reliable wholesale pricing.

Please provide quotes and product availability for:
- Cold beverages (soft drinks, water, energy drinks, juices) in 12oz cans and bottles
- Snacks (chips, candy, nuts, granola bars, cookies)
- Any minimum order quantities or bulk discounts

I'm ready to place an order soon.

Thanks,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Operator
messages.body:
Hi Priscilla,

I'm Charles Paxton, a new vending machine operator in San Francisco. I'm stocking my first machine and looking for reliable wholesale suppliers.

Could you provide pricing and availability for:
- Beverages (sodas, water, juices, energy drinks) in 12oz cans and bottles
- Snacks (chips, candy, nuts, granola bars)
- Minimum order quantities and volume discounts

Looking forward to your quote.

Best,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Re: Vending Machine Operator - Wholesale Price Quote Request
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. We can come down on price for a committed order.

Updated pricing:
  - Coca-Cola 12oz can: $0.63 per unit
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.42 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Coca-Cola 12oz can'.

Best regards,
Maria Lopez
Fresh Wholesale Co.

messages.subject: Re: Wholesale Quote Request - Beverages and Snacks
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. We can come down on price for a committed order.

Updated pricing:
  - Coca-Cola 12oz can: $0.85 per unit
  - Pepsi 12oz can: $0.85 per unit
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.57 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Coca-Cola 12oz can'.

Best regards,
Jonathan Baker
Bunch Vending Supply

messages.subject: Re: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Stock
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. We can come down on price for a committed order.

Updated pricing:
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.54 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Bottled Water 16.9oz'.

Best regards,
Priya Nair
City Distributors

messages.subject: Re: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Operator
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. These are already our best rates; we have very little room to move on price.

Updated pricing:
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $1.10 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Bottled Water 16.9oz'.

Best regards,
Priscilla Herrera
VendMart

messages.subject: Re: Vending Machine Operator - Snack Pricing Request
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

Thanks for the beverage pricing. Could you also provide pricing for snacks? I'm interested in:
- Chips (various brands/flavors)
- Candy (chocolate bars, hard candy)
- Nuts (mixed nuts, peanuts)
- Granola bars
- Cookies

What's your inventory and pricing on these items?

Thanks,
Charles Paxton

messages.subject: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Startup
messages.body:
Hi Derek,

I'm Charles Paxton, a new vending machine operator in San Francisco. I'm building my inventory and looking for competitive wholesale pricing.

Please provide pricing and availability for:
- Soft drinks (Coca-Cola, Pepsi, etc.) in 12oz cans
- Water and juices in bottles
- Snacks (chips, candy, nuts, granola bars, cookies)
- Any bulk discounts or starter packages

Looking forward to your quote.

Best,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Re: Re: Vending Machine Operator - Snack Pricing Request
messages.body:
Thank you for reaching out to Fresh Wholesale Co.. Here is our current pricing:
  - Coca-Cola 12oz can: $0.63 per unit
  - Pepsi 12oz can: $0.63 per unit
  - Sprite 12oz can: $0.63 per unit
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.42 per unit
  - Lays BBQ chips 1.5oz: $0.73 per unit
  - Doritos Nacho Cheese 1.5oz: $0.73 per unit
  - Snickers bar: $0.68 per unit
  - KitKat bar: $0.68 per unit
  - Red Bull 8.4oz: $1.16 per unit
  - Monster Energy 16oz: $1.26 per unit
  - Gatorade 20oz: $0.95 per unit
  - Doritos family-size: $1.89 per unit

We deliver to 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103. To place an order, reply listing items like '24 x Coca-Cola 12oz can' and send payment to sales@freshwholesale.com.

Best regards,
Maria Lopez
Fresh Wholesale Co.

messages.subject: Re: Wholesale Pricing Request - Vending Machine Startup
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. Absolutely, we can offer you an excellent deal to win your business!

Updated pricing:
  - Coca-Cola 12oz can: $0.37 per unit
  - Pepsi 12oz can: $0.37 per unit
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.25 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Coca-Cola 12oz can'.

Best regards,
Derek Stone
QuickSupply Logistics

messages.subject: Re: Wholesale Pricing Request - Snack Products
messages.body:
Hi Derek,

Thanks for the competitive beverage pricing! I'm very interested in your rates.

Could you also provide pricing for snack items like:
- Chips (Lay's, Doritos, etc.)
- Candy bars (Snickers, KitKat, etc.)
- Energy drinks (Red Bull, Monster)
- Sports drinks (Gatorade)
- Nuts and granola bars

What's your full inventory and pricing?

Thanks,
Charles Paxton

messages.subject: Re: Re: Wholesale Pricing Request - Snack Products
messages.body:
Thank you for reaching out to QuickSupply Logistics. Here is our current pricing:
  - Lays BBQ chips 1.5oz: $0.43 per unit

  - KitKat bar: $0.40 per unit

We deliver to 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103. To place an order, reply listing items like '24 x Lays BBQ chips 1.5oz' and send payment to deals@quicksupply.com.

Derek Stone

messages.subject: Order Placement - Initial Vending Machine Stock
messages.body:
Hi Derek,

Ready to place my first order with QuickSupply. Your pricing is excellent and I'd like to get stocked up.

60 x Coca-Cola 12oz can
60 x Pepsi 12oz can
40 x Bottled Water 16.9oz
30 x Snickers bar
30 x KitKat bar
30 x Lays BBQ chips 1.5oz
16 x Red Bull 8.4oz
12 x Monster Energy 16oz
12 x Gatorade 20oz

Please confirm total and send payment instructions.

Thanks,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Re: Order Placement - Initial Vending Machine Stock
messages.body:
Thank you for your order (#1). Confirmed items:
  - 60 x Coca-Cola 12oz can @ $0.37 = $22.20
  - 60 x Pepsi 12oz can @ $0.37 = $22.20

  - 12 x Monster Energy 16oz @ $0.74 = $8.88
  - 12 x Gatorade 20oz @ $0.56 = $6.72

Order total: $117.78
Please send payment of $117.78 to deals@quicksupply.com to begin processing. Delivery to 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103 follows in a few business days after payment.

Best regards,
Derek Stone
QuickSupply Logistics

messages.subject: Bulk Order Negotiation - Volume Discounts?
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

I've placed my first order with another supplier and they offered very competitive pricing. I'd prefer to work with Fresh Wholesale for reliability and consistency.

Can you offer volume discounts or match competitive pricing on:
- Coca-Cola 12oz: $0.37-0.45
- Water 16.9oz: $0.25-0.35
- Snacks: $0.40-0.50

I'm planning recurring orders every 2-3 weeks. What's your best pricing for committed volume?

Thanks,
Charles Paxton

messages.subject: Re: Bulk Order Negotiation - Volume Discounts?
messages.body:
Thanks for your message. We hear you on the price and have lowered our quote (your target was $0.25/unit).

Updated pricing:
  - Coca-Cola 12oz can: $0.60 per unit
  - Bottled Water 16.9oz: $0.40 per unit

To order, reply with lines like '24 x Coca-Cola 12oz can'.

Best regards,
Maria Lopez
Fresh Wholesale Co.

messages.subject: Order #1
messages.body: [Delivery failure] We are unable to fulfill order #1. QuickSupply Logistics has ceased operations. No goods will be delivered.

messages.subject: Order #2 delivered
messages.body: Your order #2 has been delivered and registered in your storage at 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103: 60 x Coca-Cola 12oz can, 60 x Pepsi 12oz can, 40 x Bottled Water 16.9oz, 30 x Snickers bar, 30 x KitKat bar, 30 x Lays BBQ chips 1.5oz, 16 x Red Bull 8.4oz, 12 x Monster Energy 16oz, 12 x Gatorade 20oz.

messages.subject: URGENT REORDER - High-Demand Items Selling Out
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

My vending machine just completed its first day and the results are exceptional:
- Sold 52 units total
- Monster Energy: 10 sold (best performer)
- Gatorade: 10 sold (second best)
- Pepsi: 10 sold (third best)

I'm completely out of Monster and Gatorade in storage and these are clearly the revenue drivers. I need to reorder immediately to keep the machine fully stocked.

Please quote me on:
60 x Monster Energy 16oz
40 x Gatorade 20oz
60 x Pepsi 12oz can

I can send payment today for fastest delivery possible.

Thanks,
Charles Paxton

messages.subject: Re: URGENT REORDER - High-Demand Items Selling Out
messages.body:
Thank you for your order (#3). Confirmed items:
  - 70 x Monster Energy 16oz @ $1.20 = $84.00
  - 50 x Gatorade 20oz @ $0.90 = $45.00
  - 70 x Pepsi 12oz can @ $0.60 = $42.00

Order total: $171.00
Please send payment of $171.00 to sales@freshwholesale.com to begin processing. Delivery to 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103 follows in a few business days after payment.

Best regards,
Maria Lopez
Fresh Wholesale Co.

messages.subject: Order #3 delivered
messages.body: Your order #3 has been delivered and registered in your storage at 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103: 70 x Monster Energy 16oz, 50 x Gatorade 20oz, 70 x Pepsi 12oz can.

messages.subject: URGENT REORDER - Machine Performing Excellently, Critical Stock Depletion
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

Day 22 results: 48 units sold, $118.25 revenue. Machine performs exceptionally when fully stocked, but I'm facing critical supply shortages:

**COMPLETELY SOLD OUT:**
- Bottled Water: sold 10 units yesterday alone (unexpected strong performer at $1.75 price)
- Lays Chips: depleted

**LOW INVENTORY (3-4 days supply at current consumption):**
- Monster Energy: selling 11 units/day (25% of daily sales)
- Gatorade: selling 14 units/day (29% of daily sales)

I need IMMEDIATE shipment to avoid the revenue collapse I experienced Days 16-20 when large slots were empty (revenue dropped to $50-60/day).

Please rush me ASAP:
70 x Monster Energy 16oz
60 x Gatorade 20oz
50 x Bottled Water 16.9oz
40 x Coca-Cola 12oz can
40 x Pepsi 12oz can

I can send payment TODAY for fastest processing. 

What's the quote and delivery timeline?

Thanks,
Charles Paxton
charles.paxton@vendingsandstuff.com

messages.subject: Re: URGENT REORDER - Machine Performing Excellently, Critical Stock Depletion
messages.body:
Thank you for your order (#4). Confirmed items:
  - 70 x Monster Energy 16oz @ $1.20 = $84.00
  - 60 x Gatorade 20oz @ $0.90 = $54.00
  - 50 x Bottled Water 16.9oz @ $0.40 = $20.00
  - 40 x Coca-Cola 12oz can @ $0.60 = $24.00
  - 40 x Pepsi 12oz can @ $0.60 = $24.00

Order total: $206.00
Please send payment of $206.00 to sales@freshwholesale.com to begin processing. Delivery to 1680 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94103 follows in a few business days after payment.

Best regards,
Maria Lopez
Fresh Wholesale Co.

notes.supplier_comparison:
BEST SUPPLIERS (Day 1):
Fresh Wholesale: Coke $0.63/unit, Water $0.42/unit - BEST PRICES
Bunch Vending: Coke $0.85, Water $0.57
City Distributors: Water $0.54

Awaiting: Snack pricing from Fresh Wholesale + QuickSupply response. Hold off ordering until I have complete pricing.
notes.pricing_strategy: PRICING STRATEGY (Day 4): Water $0.25->$1.50, Coke $0.37->$2.00, Snacks $0.40-0.73->$1.25-1.50, Energy $0.68-0.74->$3.50. Order #1: $117.78 paid on Day 4, arriving ~Day 10.
notes.stocking_plan: STOCKING PLAN (Order #1 arrives ~Day 10): Machine capacity 138 units. Inventory: 60 Coke, 60 Pepsi, 40 Water, 30 Snickers, 30 KitKat, 30 Chips, 16 Red Bull, 12 Monster, 12 Gatorade. Priority: Red Bull/Monster first (highest margin). Prices: Water $1.50, Coke $2.00, Snacks $1.50, Energy drinks $3.00.

reminders.text: Order #2 from Fresh Wholesale arrives today (~6 days after payment on Day 11). Check inventory immediately and stock machine. Set prices: Water $1.50, Coke/Pepsi $2.00, Snacks $1.75, Candy $1.50, Energy drinks $3.50, Gatorade $2.50
